label: v5_2_drop_volatility_normal
hypothesis: Removing the `volatility_normal` evidence flag will increase ENTER_CANDIDATE count without materially worsening win rate, because ATR-percentile is orthogonal to setup quality.
risk_if_wrong: More setups during compressed volatility (ATR ≤25 percentile) may hit SL before TP when volatility expands. Watch DD.
promotion_criteria: no per-pair regression (USD/JPY net pips not worse than baseline) AND
rejection_triggers: USD/JPY net pips below baseline by > 50 pips OR
